description: CompositionBlue jersey made of 100% polyester engineered with ClimaCool technology, has a mandarin collar with mesh inserts, half zipper on the front, short sleeves with DLF IPL printed on the left sleeve, Delhi Daredevils printed on the left chest, adidas brand logo on the right chest, Muthoot group logo on the front, patented adidas 3-Stripes on the shoulders and sublimated print (heat transfer printing) on the front to make the jersey more breathable, flexible and for softer hand feel compared to standard rubber printFitAthleticWash careMachine wash in lukewarm water below 40 degrees, using a mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyDo not soak, bleach, tumble dry, dry clean or iron on print/trims/ logoDry in shadeWarm ironThe Indian Premier League has kick started. You know your team never shies away from a challenge and you too can embrace their never-say-die spirit when you wear this Delhi Daredevils match jersey from Adidas! With an all new look and design for the 2012 DLF IPL, the Climacool fabric keeps you dry and comfortable during the heat of the day. So wear this stylish jersey and cheer for your favourite team at the IPL.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18'
